markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and demo an AI-powered content generation approach for Homebase using GPT models and web research.](https://fathom.video/share/sSc9HZ5s9T5AyyzY5FUXc-UzZ9SEnTyS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel demoed an AI workflow for generating content outlines and articles by combining web research, GPT models like GPT-4, and human review steps](https://fathom.video/share/sSc9HZ5s9T5AyyzY5FUXc-UzZ9SEnTyS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [The approach shows promise but needs calibration - tweaking prompts, guidelines, quality checks etc. based on Homebase's requirements](https://fathom.video/share/sSc9HZ5s9T5AyyzY5FUXc-UzZ9SEnTyS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [There are opportunities to generate high volumes of content variations efficiently by extending existing content](https://fathom.video/share/sSc9HZ5s9T5AyyzY5FUXc-UzZ9SEnTyS?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Next steps are to further collaborate, get feedback, and run initial test batches while monitoring quality](https://fathom.video/share/sSc9HZ5s9T5AyyzY5FUXc-UzZ9SEnTyS?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)

## Topics

### AI Content Workflow Demo

  - [Generates content by combining web research summaries, outline from GPT-4, and article writing](https://fathom.video/share/sSc9HZ5s9T5AyyzY5FUXc-UzZ9SEnTyS?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [Allows human review at multiple steps - choosing web sources, reviewing outline, final article etc.](https://fathom.video/share/sSc9HZ5s9T5AyyzY5FUXc-UzZ9SEnTyS?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Showed examples of generated articles on topics like "tip pooling laws in California"](https://fathom.video/share/sSc9HZ5s9T5AyyzY5FUXc-UzZ9SEnTyS?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Ability to customize prompts, add guidelines, link to sources, avoid plagiarism etc.](https://fathom.video/share/sSc9HZ5s9T5AyyzY5FUXc-UzZ9SEnTyS?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)

### Opportunities and Tradeoffs

  - [Can generate high volumes by extending existing content to different states, industries etc.](https://fathom.video/share/sSc9HZ5s9T5AyyzY5FUXc-UzZ9SEnTyS?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Faster turnaround than human writers, more cost-effective for lower traffic keywords](https://fathom.video/share/sSc9HZ5s9T5AyyzY5FUXc-UzZ9SEnTyS?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Tradeoff between volume and quality - more human reviews means lower throughput](https://fathom.video/share/sSc9HZ5s9T5AyyzY5FUXc-UzZ9SEnTyS?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Risks like making up facts, inconsistent tone need to be mitigated](https://fathom.video/share/sSc9HZ5s9T5AyyzY5FUXc-UzZ9SEnTyS?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)

### Feedback and Concerns

  - [Exclude unreliable sources like Wikipedia, competitors etc. from research](https://fathom.video/share/sSc9HZ5s9T5AyyzY5FUXc-UzZ9SEnTyS?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [Check for plagiarism, made-up statistics/stories - human oversight is key](https://fathom.video/share/sSc9HZ5s9T5AyyzY5FUXc-UzZ9SEnTyS?tab=summary&timestamp=2259.0)
  - [Customize tone, structure, guidelines to Homebase's preferences](https://fathom.video/share/sSc9HZ5s9T5AyyzY5FUXc-UzZ9SEnTyS?tab=summary&timestamp=2186.0)
  - [Explore other use cases beyond articles - calculators, Q\&A, refreshing existing content etc.](https://fathom.video/share/sSc9HZ5s9T5AyyzY5FUXc-UzZ9SEnTyS?tab=summary&timestamp=2186.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to further discuss requirements, guidelines, use cases with Homebase team](https://fathom.video/share/sSc9HZ5s9T5AyyzY5FUXc-UzZ9SEnTyS?tab=summary&timestamp=3212.0)
  - [Set up test runs on Homebase's instance, compare against human-written content](https://fathom.video/share/sSc9HZ5s9T5AyyzY5FUXc-UzZ9SEnTyS?tab=summary&timestamp=3191.0)
  - [Iterate on the workflow based on feedback - prompts, quality checks, human reviews etc.](https://fathom.video/share/sSc9HZ5s9T5AyyzY5FUXc-UzZ9SEnTyS?tab=summary&timestamp=3191.0)
  - [Explore publishing initial test batches while continuing calibration](https://fathom.video/share/sSc9HZ5s9T5AyyzY5FUXc-UzZ9SEnTyS?tab=summary&timestamp=3191.0)
